title: Installation issue when reinstalling n8n on Termux
symptom: Users encounter issues when trying to install n8n globally via npm on Termux after reinstalling the app.
not_this_if: Using a different environment or OS
root_cause: The installation of n8n on Termux may fail due to missing dependencies that are required for the build process. Specifically, the absence of the 'binutils' package can lead to errors during installation.
fix_steps: Retry the installation of n8n using npm
agent_instruction: Install the 'binutils' package in Termux before reinstalling n8n.
